roles.title: Director of the Data Protection Agency
roles.context: position of the Director of the Data Protection Agency (referred to in this Act as the "Director"), who shall serve as the head of the Agency

roles.title: Deputy Director
roles.context: There is established the position of Deputy Director, who shall be appointed by the Director; and serve as the acting Director in the absence or unavailability of the Director

roles.title: acting Director
roles.context: In the event of the death, resignation, sickness, or absence of the Director, the President shall designate the Deputy Director to serve as acting Director
